SEARCH
Package project2_root.models

Class OrderInventoryModel

java.lang.Object
project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Model
public class OrderInventoryModel extends Object implements Model
Model for the Order Inventory family of views (order list, order detail, and create order).

Manages restock order state including the currently selected order, critical ingredient detection, and order submission. Also owns validation, parsing, and display-formatting helpers for its controllers.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    WEEKS_TO_COVER
    The number of weeks of projected demand that ingredient stock must cover before an ingredient is considered sufficiently stocked.

  • Field Details

    • WEEKS_TO_COVER

      public static final int WEEKS_TO_COVER
      The number of weeks of projected demand that ingredient stock must cover before an ingredient is considered sufficiently stocked. Increase this value to trigger critical alerts earlier.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • OrderInventoryModel

      public OrderInventoryModel(POSDatabase database, Runnable onOrderComplete)
      Constructs the model with a database connection and a completion callback.
      Parameters:
      database - the active POSDatabase instance
      onOrderComplete - a callback invoked after an order is submitted or cancelled, typically used to navigate away

  • Method Details

    • onOrderComplete

      public void onOrderComplete()
      Invokes the order-complete callback. Called after a restock order is submitted or the create-order flow is cancelled.

    • navigateToManagerActions

      public void navigateToManagerActions()
      Navigates to the Manager Actions hub.

    • setSelectedOrder

      public void setSelectedOrder(RestockOrder order)
      Sets the order that the Order Detail view should display.
      Parameters:
      order - the restock order to select

    • getSelectedOrder

      public RestockOrder getSelectedOrder()
      Returns the currently selected restock order.
      Returns:
      the selected RestockOrder, or null if none is set

    • confirmSelectedOrder

      public void confirmSelectedOrder()
      Confirms the currently selected order via the database, which marks it as confirmed and increments ingredient stock levels. Does nothing if no order is currently selected.

    • getRestockOrders

      public Collection<RestockOrder> getRestockOrders()
      Returns all restock orders, ordered by date descending.
      Returns:
      a collection of all RestockOrder records

    • hasRestockOrders

      public boolean hasRestockOrders()
      Returns whether any restock orders exist in the database.
      Returns:
      true if at least one restock order exists

    • getCriticalIngredients

      public Collection<Ingredient> getCriticalIngredients()
      Returns all ingredients whose current stock falls below the threshold needed to cover WEEKS_TO_COVER weeks of projected demand.
      Returns:
      a collection of critical Ingredient records

    • hasCriticalIngredients

      public boolean hasCriticalIngredients()
      Returns whether any ingredients are currently below the critical stock threshold.
      Returns:
      true if at least one ingredient is critically low

    • getAllIngredients

      public Collection<Ingredient> getAllIngredients()
      Returns all ingredients from the database, ordered by name.
      Returns:
      a collection of all Ingredient records

    • submitRestockOrder

      public void submitRestockOrder(Map<Integer,Integer> ingredientQuantities)
      Submits a new restock order with the given ingredient quantities.
      Parameters:
      ingredientQuantities - a map of ingredient ID to ordered quantity; should contain only non-zero entries

    • confirmOrder

      public void confirmOrder(int orderId)
      Confirms a restock order by ID directly. Prefer confirmSelectedOrder() when operating on the currently selected order.
      Parameters:
      orderId - the ID of the order to confirm

    • addIngredient

      public int addIngredient(String name, double addCost)
      Adds a new ingredient to the database with zero starting stock.
      Parameters:
      name - the ingredient name
      addCost - the per-unit restock cost
      Returns:
      the generated ID of the new ingredient, or -1 on failure

    • validateIngredient

      public String validateIngredient(String name, String rawCost)
      Validates ingredient form input.
      Parameters:
      name - the ingredient name to validate
      rawCost - the raw cost string to validate
      Returns:
      an error message string if invalid, or null if valid

    • parseCost

      public double parseCost(String rawCost)
      Parses a raw cost string into a double.
      Parameters:
      rawCost - the trimmed cost string; must be a valid decimal number
      Returns:
      the parsed cost value

    • getRecommendedOrderQuantities

      public Map<Integer,Integer> getRecommendedOrderQuantities()
      Builds a map of recommended restock quantities for all critical ingredients, keyed by ingredient ID.
      Returns:
      a map of ingredient ID to recommended restock quantity

    • buildOrderItems

      public Map<Integer,Integer> buildOrderItems(Map<Integer,Integer> rawQuantities)
      Filters a raw quantity map down to only non-zero entries suitable for order submission.
      Parameters:
      rawQuantities - a map of ingredient ID to raw spinner value
      Returns:
      a filtered map of non-zero quantities, or null if all quantities are zero

    • formatOrderTitle

      public String formatOrderTitle(RestockOrder order)
      Returns:
      a formatted order title, e.g. "Order #4 — Jan 1, 2025 3:00 PM"

    • formatOrderCost

      public String formatOrderCost(RestockOrder order)
      Returns:
      the order's total cost formatted as "Total: $0.00"

    • formatOrderItemCount

      public String formatOrderItemCount(RestockOrder order)
      Returns:
      the order's item count formatted as "N item(s)"

    • formatOrderStatus

      public String formatOrderStatus(RestockOrder order)
      Returns:
      the order's status formatted as "Status: confirmed"

    • formatStockLevel

      public String formatStockLevel(Ingredient ingredient)
      Returns:
      the ingredient's current stock formatted as "Current stock: N servings"

    • formatRecommendedRestock

      public String formatRecommendedRestock(Ingredient ingredient)
      Returns:
      the ingredient's recommended restock quantity formatted as "Recommended restock: N units"
